name: prisma-zod-consistency
description: Static + live-DB linter for Prisma schemas, Zod schemas, and TypeScript code — finds drift before prod does.

plugins.name: prisma-zod-consistency
plugins.description: Audit Prisma + Zod + TypeScript projects for cross-layer drift between the database schema, the Zod validation layer, and how they're used in route handlers. Wraps the deterministic prisma-zod-consistency CLI with contextual analysis, recommended fixes, and optional auto-fix.
